title: Here’s what’s worth streaming in June 2026 on Netflix, Hulu, HBO Max and more
summary: Major streaming platforms are releasing high-profile content in June 2026, including HBO's House of the Dragon, Hulu's The Bear, and Apple's Cape Fear. These releases will compete with viewership during the World Cup. The article guides viewers on what to watch across Netflix, Hulu, HBO Max, and other platforms.
content: HBO’s ‘House of the Dragon,’ Hulu’s ‘The Bear’ and Apple’s ‘Cape Fear’ will try to compete with the World Cup

zh.title: 2026年6月Netflix、Hulu、HBO Max等平台值得观看的内容
zh.summary: 主要流媒体平台在2026年6月推出高热度内容，包括HBO的《龙之家族》、Hulu的《厨师》和Apple的《恐惧斗篷》。这些新发布将与世界杯观众竞争。该文章为观众提供了关于Netflix、Hulu、HBO Max和其他平台上值得观看内容的指南。

title: Amazon unveils latest warehouse robot as tech giants continue AI layoffs
summary: Amazon has unveiled a new warehouse robot as major tech companies continue reducing their AI workforce. The company argues that automation has historically increased employment rather than reduced it. The development highlights the contrast between investment in robotics and ongoing layoffs in AI roles.
content: "Our experience of robots is that it's actually driven up employment rather than the reverse," Amazon executive John Boumphrey told CNBC.

zh.title: 亚马逊推出最新仓库机器人，科技巨头继续裁减AI员工
zh.summary: 亚马逊推出新款仓库机器人，此时主要科技公司正在继续裁减AI员工。该公司辩称自动化历来是增加而非减少就业。这一发展突出了机器人投资与AI岗位持续裁员之间的对比。

title: S&P 500 sees $1.8 trillion wipeout, Nasdaq tallies biggest point drop on record: What investors need to know about Friday’s selloff
summary: The stock market experienced a significant selloff on Friday, with the Nasdaq Composite dropping over 1,121 points—its largest single-day point decline on record. The S&P 500 saw approximately $1.8 trillion in losses as the market's two-month rally came to a halt.
content: A remarkable two-month sprint higher for major stock-market indexes encountered its first major hiccup on Friday as the Nasdaq Composite plummeted more than 1,121 points — the biggest one day point drop on record, according to Dow Jones Market Data.

zh.title: 标普500指数蒸发1.8万亿美元，纳斯达克创纪录最大跌幅：投资者需要了解的周五抛售情况
zh.summary: 股市在周五经历了大幅下跌，纳斯达克综合指数下跌超过1121点，创下单日最大跌幅纪录。标普500指数损失约1.8万亿美元，市场为期两个月的上升趋势戛然而止。

title: We thought we found the perfect luxury retirement community, but it’s millions of dollars in debt. Are we trapped?
summary: A luxury retirement community faces severe financial problems, putting residents at risk of losing substantial buy-in investments if they leave. The community is reportedly millions of dollars in debt, creating uncertainty for residents who believed they had secured a safe retirement. The situation raises concerns about investment security in such communities.
content: “If we were to leave, we would lose a portion of our buy-in — about $80,000.”

zh.title: 我们以为找到了完美的豪华退休社区，但它却有数百万美元的债务。我们被困住了吗？
zh.summary: 一个豪华退休社区面临严重的财务问题，使居民面临离开时失去大量买入投资的风险。据报道，该社区欠债数百万美元，给那些相信自己已经确保安全退休的居民造成了不确定性。这种情况引发了人们对此类社区投资安全性的担忧。

title: Iran's threats against this Red Sea choke point are a big vulnerability for the oil market
summary: Iran's threats to the Bab el-Mandeb Strait in the Red Sea represent a significant vulnerability for global oil markets. If Iranian-backed Houthi forces attack ships in this critical waterway, oil prices could spike substantially. The strait's importance as a major shipping route makes it a key geopolitical risk factor.
content: Oil prices would spike if Iran's Houthi allies started attacking ships passing through the Bab el-Mandeb Strait.

zh.title: 伊朗对这条红海咽喉点的威胁对石油市场造成重大漏洞
zh.summary: 伊朗对红海曼德海峡的威胁对全球石油市场构成重大脆弱性。如果伊朗支持的胡塞武装对这条关键水道的船只发动攻击，油价可能会大幅上涨。该海峡作为主要航运路线的重要性使其成为关键的地缘政治风险因素。

title: Bitcoin is suffering from an ‘attention’ deficit, as momentum traders have moved on
summary: Bitcoin is losing momentum as traders shift their focus and capital toward artificial intelligence investments. Analysts attribute the shift to AI's stronger appeal and profit potential compared to cryptocurrencies. The cryptocurrency market is experiencing reduced investor attention as market momentum has rotated away from crypto assets.
content: “The AI trade is sucking the blood out of crypto,” one analyst notes.

zh.title: 比特币正在经历"注意力"赤字，因为动量交易者已经转向其他方向
zh.summary: 随着交易者将注意力和资本转向人工智能投资，比特币正在失去动力。分析人士将这一转变归因于人工智能相比加密货币具有更强的吸引力和利润潜力。加密货币市场正在经历投资者关注度下降，市场动量已经从加密资产转向其他方向。

title: US stocks slump as fears over Big Tech shake Wall Street
summary: U.S. stock markets experienced a significant decline as investor concerns about large technology companies intensified. The Nasdaq suffered its worst daily performance since early 2025, reflecting growing anxiety about Big Tech valuations. The pullback indicates a shift in market sentiment toward major technology stocks.
content: The Nasdaq saw its biggest daily fall since early 2025.

zh.title: 对科技巨头的担忧冲击华尔街，美股暴跌
zh.summary: 由于投资者对大型科技公司的担忧加剧，美国股市经历了显著下跌。纳斯达克指数创下2025年初以来最差的单日表现，反映出对科技巨头估值日益增长的焦虑。此次回调表明投资者对大型科技股的市场情绪发生了转变。

title: Marvell Technology and Flex to join S&P 500 index, replacing Pool and Campbell's
summary: Marvell Technology and Flex have been selected to join the S&P 500 index, replacing Pool and Campbell's in the benchmark. The change underscores the increasing dominance of technology companies within the broader stock market. The move reflects the ongoing shift toward tech-heavy portfolio composition in major market indexes.
content: The move highlights the growing importance of the technology sector to the stock market.

zh.title: 马维尔科技和伟凌科技加入标普500指数，取代Pool和金宝汤
zh.summary: 马维尔科技和伟凌科技被选中加入标普500指数，在基准中取代Pool和金宝汤。这一变化凸显了科技公司在更广泛股票市场中主导地位的持续增强。这一举措反映了主要市场指数中科技驱动的投资组合构成的持续转变。

title: ‘No one wears bling’: What does it say about America if people are afraid to wear their jewelry?
summary: Consumer behavior regarding jewelry displays reflects broader concerns about safety and economic inequality in America. The shift away from wearing visible luxury items signals anxiety about conspicuous consumption in uncertain times.
content: “I’ve been to many shows, operas, big parties and fundraisers.”

zh.title: "没人戴奢侈品"：如果美国人害怕佩戴珠宝，这说明了什么？
zh.summary: 消费者关于珠宝展示的行为反映了对美国安全和经济不平等的更广泛担忧。远离佩戴可见奢侈品的转变表明人们在不确定时期对炫耀性消费的焦虑。

title: Boeing to start 737 Max production on new assembly line July 6, CEO says
summary: Boeing will begin operations on a new 737 Max final assembly line in Everett, Washington, starting July 6. The new line is designed to significantly increase production capacity to 52 aircraft per month. This expansion marks a key step in Boeing's recovery and effort to restore its market position in commercial aviation.
content: The new 737 Max final assembly line in Everett, Washington, will serve as a catalyst for increasing Max production to 52 jets per month.

zh.title: 波音首席执行官表示将于7月6日在新装配线启动737 Max生产
zh.summary: 波音将于7月6日在位于华盛顿州埃弗里特的新737 Max最终装配线上启动运营。新装配线旨在将生产能力大幅提高至每月52架飞机。这一扩产标志着波音复苏的关键步骤，也是波音为恢复其商用航空市场地位所做的重要努力。

title: First Google, now Meta? Big Tech may increasingly sell stock to bankroll $820 billion AI boom.
summary: Major technology companies like Google and Meta may increase stock sales to finance the massive $820 billion investment needed for their artificial intelligence initiatives. While equity investors may be concerned about dilution, bond investors funding the AI buildout are supportive. This reflects a potential shift in how Big Tech finances its ambitious AI expansion.
content: Stock investors may not love it — but bond investors already heavily engaged in funding the AI buildout are pleased.

zh.title: 首先是谷歌，现在是Meta？大科技公司可能会越来越多地出售股票来支持820亿美元的AI热潮
zh.summary: 谷歌和Meta等主要科技公司可能会增加股票销售，以筹集人工智能计划所需的庞大820亿美元投资。虽然股权投资者可能担心股权稀释，但为AI建设提供资金的债券投资者表示支持。这反映了大科技公司融资方式的潜在转变，用于支持其雄心勃勃的AI扩展。

title: These stocks fell the most Friday as Big Tech took a dive
summary: Semiconductor manufacturers led the market's decline on Friday, suffering the largest losses among S&P 500 companies. The chip sector weakness reflects broader concerns about the technology sector and cooling investor sentiment. Chipmakers' poor performance highlights their sensitivity to Big Tech weakness and market corrections.
content: Chip makers dominated the list of the day’s biggest losers among the S&P 500.

zh.title: 周五这些股票跌幅最大，因为大科技公司下跌
zh.summary: 半导体制造商周五领导了市场的下跌，在标普500指数公司中遭受最大损失。芯片行业的疲软反映了对科技行业的广泛担忧和投资者情绪降温。芯片制造商的表现不佳突显了它们对大科技公司疲软和市场调整的敏感性。

title: SpaceX is set to be a 'seminal event' for the stock market next week. Here's what's ahead
summary: SpaceX's anticipated initial public offering is positioned as a watershed moment for the stock market, potentially marking the first of several trillion-dollar-valued companies going public. The IPO could have significant implications for a stock market already trading at record levels. Analysts are examining what such a major company valuation means for market dynamics.
content: What the first of several trillion-dollar companies going public will mean for a stock market that's already at all-time highs.

zh.title: SpaceX将成为下周股市的"划时代事件"。以下是接下来的情况
zh.summary: SpaceX期待的首次公开募股被定位为股市的分水岭时刻，可能标志着第一批数万亿美元估值公司上市。这次首次公开募股可能对已经以创纪录水平交易的股市产生重大影响。分析师正在研究如此大规模公司估值对市场动态意味着什么。

title: Marvell, Micron shares tumble as the chip sector suffers its worst day in 6 years
summary: Semiconductor stocks including Marvell and Micron experienced sharp declines as the chip sector suffered its worst trading day in six years. The selloff reflects investor repositioning away from momentum stocks, partly triggered by concerns about a strong jobs report. The sector's weakness signals broader concerns about valuations for technology-related investments.
content: Investors are cooling on momentum stocks and considering the implications of a strong jobs report.

zh.title: Marvell、Micron股价暴跌，芯片行业6年来最差交易日
zh.summary: 包括Marvell和Micron在内的半导体股票经历了急剧下跌，芯片行业经历了六年来最差的交易日。抛售反映了投资者从动量股票的重新定位，部分原因是对强劲就业报告的担忧。该行业的疲软表明了对技术相关投资估值的广泛担忧。

title: Google to pay SpaceX $920 million a month for compute capacity at xAI data centers
summary: Google has agreed to pay SpaceX $920 million monthly for compute capacity at xAI data centers as part of a 32-month agreement. The deal comes as SpaceX prepares for its highly anticipated initial public offering. The contract demonstrates massive demand for computational resources supporting artificial intelligence development among major tech companies.
content: Ahead of a planned IPO, SpaceX inked a deal to rent compute capacity to Google for $920 million per month for 32 months.

zh.title: 谷歌同意每月向SpaceX支付9.2亿美元以获取xAI数据中心的计算能力
zh.summary: 谷歌已同意每月向SpaceX支付9.2亿美元，用于在xAI数据中心获取计算能力，这是一份为期32个月协议的一部分。该交易发生在SpaceX准备其备受期待的首次公开募股之际。该合同展示了支持大型科技公司人工智能开发的计算资源的巨大需求。

title: Free Thinking
summary: The article examines philosophical questions about the ethics of wealth accumulation and draws lessons from Adam Smith's economic and ethical inquiry. It explores the moral dimensions of capitalism and references Smith's foundational economic thinking. The piece considers contemporary applications of classical economic philosophy to modern wealth debates.
content: Can the accumulation of wealth be ethical and what can we learn from Adam Smith's enquiry?

zh.title: 自由思考
zh.summary: 该文章审视了关于财富积累伦理的哲学问题，并从亚当·斯密的经济和伦理研究中汲取教训。它探讨了资本主义的道德层面，并参考了斯密的基础经济思想。该作品考虑了将古典经济哲学应用于现代财富辩论的当代意义。

title: A sell-off like Friday's is ‘rarely the top’ of a rally, says Wharton’s Jeremy Siegel
summary: Wharton economist Jeremy Siegel argues the current AI-driven market rally differs fundamentally from past bubbles, comparing it to the transformative impact of the Industrial Revolution. He suggests that Friday's market sell-off is unlikely to mark the peak of this sustained rally.
content: The artificial intelligence-driven rally is different from previous market bubbles, according to Siegel, who likened it to the Industrial Revolution.

zh.title: 沃顿大学杰里米·西格尔：像周五这样的抛售"很少是反弹的顶部"
zh.summary: 沃顿经济学家杰里米·西格尔主张，当前由人工智能驱动的市场反弹从根本上不同于过去的泡沫，将其与工业革命的变革性影响相比较。他认为周五的市场抛售不太可能标志着这一持续反弹的峰值。

title: Delta SkyMiles credit cards now come with 2 free checked bags and monster intro offers. Are they worth it?
summary: Delta SkyMiles credit cards have upgraded their benefits to include two free checked bags and enhanced rideshare credits while maintaining existing annual fees. The cards now offer hundreds of dollars in potential annual value, making them potentially more attractive to frequent flyers.
content: From two free checked bags to new rideshare credits, Delta SkyMiles cards now offer hundreds of dollars in added value each year — for the same annual fees.

zh.title: 达美天空哩程信用卡现在提供2个免费行李托运和超大初始优惠。值得办卡吗？
zh.summary: 达美天空哩程信用卡已升级其福利，在保持现有年费的同时，增加了两个免费行李托运和增强的打车积分。这些卡现在提供数百美元的潜在年度价值，使其对常旅客更具吸引力。

title: Mythos rejuvenated the cybersecurity sector. Earnings put the recent rally to the test
summary: Mythos' emergence injected new momentum into the cybersecurity sector, but recent earnings reports have tempered investor enthusiasm despite strong results. The sector's rally faces headwinds as investors increasingly focus on artificial intelligence-related opportunities rather than traditional cybersecurity gains.
content: Mythos gave the cybersecurity sector a boost, but upbeat earnings weren't enough for investors in search of an AI payoff.

zh.title: Mythos使网络安全部门重获生机。收益报告对最近的反弹进行了考验
zh.summary: Mythos的出现为网络安全部门注入了新的动力，但最近的收益报告尽管取得了强劲的结果，但仍然降低了投资者的热情。随着投资者越来越多地关注与人工智能相关的机会而不是传统网络安全收益，该部门的反弹面临逆风。

title: Meta's stock sinks on report company could raise tens of billions of dollars to fund AI push
summary: Meta's stock price declined following reports that the company is considering raising tens of billions of dollars through a stock offering to finance its artificial intelligence initiatives. The potential dilution to existing shareholders and capital requirements for AI development are concerning investors.
content: Meta shares dropped after the Financial Times reported the company could potentially raise tens of billions of dollars in a stock offering to help its AI push.

zh.title: Meta股票因筹资数百亿美元用于AI发展而下跌
zh.summary: Meta股价下跌，原因是有报道称该公司考虑通过股票发行筹集数百亿美元来为其人工智能计划融资。对现有股东的潜在稀释和AI发展所需的资本引发了投资者的担忧。

title: Trump to meet AI leaders to discuss US investment in their companies
summary: President Trump announced plans to meet with leaders of major AI companies next week to discuss potential U.S. investment strategies. The upcoming meetings signal the administration's focus on the country's competitive position in artificial intelligence development.
content: The US president said on Friday he expects to meet the leaders of top AI companies next week.

zh.title: 特朗普将与AI领导人会面讨论美国对其公司的投资
zh.summary: 特朗普总统宣布计划下周与主要AI公司的领导人会面，讨论潜在的美国投资战略。即将举行的会议表明政府专注于该国在人工智能发展中的竞争地位。

title: Nearly half of workers 55 and older don’t plan on using AI in their jobs. How to make it work for you.
summary: Nearly half of workers 55 and older aren't planning to adopt AI in their jobs despite its growing workplace prevalence. Career coaches point to social media platforms like YouTube and TikTok as accessible resources where older workers can learn practical applications of AI tools.
content: Workers can learn more about applying AI to their jobs even on social-media platforms, such as YouTube and TikTok, one career coach said.

zh.title: 一半以上的55岁及以上员工不打算在工作中使用AI。如何为你所用。
zh.summary: 尽管AI在工作场所日益普及，近一半的55岁及以上的员工不打算在工作中采用AI。职业教练指出，YouTube和TikTok等社交媒体平台是老年工人学习AI工具实际应用的便捷资源。

title: Trump administration, OpenAI discussing possible government stake in the AI startup
summary: The Trump administration and OpenAI are discussing a possible government equity stake in the AI startup, an idea OpenAI CEO Sam Altman first proposed to Trump officials in 2025. The arrangement would represent an unprecedented partnership between the federal government and a major AI company.
content: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman first shared the idea with the Trump administration in 2025, according to a source.

zh.title: 特朗普政府、OpenAI讨论政府可能入股该AI初创公司
zh.summary: 特朗普政府和OpenAI正在讨论政府对该AI初创公司的可能股权投资，这个想法是OpenAI首席执行官Sam Altman在2025年首次向特朗普官员提出的。这项安排将代表联邦政府与一家主要AI公司之间前所未有的合作。

title: Model routing is a fix for AI overspending. That's a problem for OpenAI and Anthropic
summary: Model routing—matching specific tasks to appropriately-sized AI models instead of using the most powerful one for everything—is emerging as a cost-control strategy for companies seeking to reduce AI spending. The practice threatens profit margins for OpenAI and Anthropic, which have built business models around premium models.
content: Companies are shifting from running everything on the most powerful AI model to matching each task to the right one, a practice called model routing.

zh.title: 模型路由是解决AI过度支出的办法。这对OpenAI和Anthropic来说是个问题
zh.summary: 模型路由——将特定任务与大小合适的AI模型相匹配，而不是对所有任务都使用最强大的模型——正在成为公司寻求减少AI支出的成本控制策略。这种做法威胁到了以高级模型为商业模式基础的OpenAI和Anthropic的利润率。

title: An S&P 500 shakeup is hours away. These stocks could soon earn spots in the index.
summary: MicroStrategy (MSTR), Reddit, and a mortgage company are among the leading candidates to be added to the S&P 500 Index during the benchmark's next quarterly rebalancing. The additions would boost these companies' profiles and potentially their valuations.
content: Marvell, Reddit and a mortgage “dark horse” could make the cut during the next quarterly rebalancing of the benchmark index.

zh.title: S&P 500指数大调整即将来临。这些股票有望被纳入。
zh.summary: 微策略(MSTR)、Reddit和一家抵押贷款公司是下一次季度再平衡中被纳入S&P 500指数的主要候选者。这些纳入将提升这些公司的知名度，并可能推高它们的估值。

title: Will you be audited by Trump’s IRS? New data says there’s one group that can breathe a lot easier.
summary: A new report on IRS operations reveals significant variation in audit rates across different demographic groups under the second Trump presidency. The data shows which populations face heightened audit scrutiny and which can expect relative relief.
content: A new report out Friday reflects IRS audit activity and other operations at the start of the second Trump presidency.

zh.title: 你会被特朗普政府的国税局审计吗？新数据显示有一个群体可以放心了。
zh.summary: 一份关于国税局运营的新报告显示，在特朗普第二任期内，不同人口群体的审计率存在显著差异。数据表明哪些群体面临更高的审计力度，哪些则可以期待相对的宽松。

title: Crypto mutiny on Strategy: Shorts target 'MSTR' in bitcoin bloodbath
summary: MicroStrategy's stock (MSTR) and preferred stock (STRC) are facing mounting bearish pressure from short sellers amid broader cryptocurrency volatility. The weakness reflects growing skepticism among investors toward the company's crypto-focused strategy.
content: Flows around Strategy (MSTR) and the company's variable-rate preferred stock STRC are turning bearish this week.

zh.title: 加密货币变局：空头在比特币暴跌中狙击"MSTR"
zh.summary: 微策略的普通股(MSTR)和优先股(STRC)在更广泛的加密货币波动中面临来自空头不断增强的看跌压力。这种疲软反映了投资者对该公司加密货币为中心战略的日益怀疑。

title: The Fed may already be too late in hiking interest rates — which is bad news for these borrowers
summary: Friday's stronger-than-expected jobs report has all but eliminated the possibility of near-term Federal Reserve interest rate cuts, disappointing borrowers struggling with persistent inflation. The strong labor market creates a difficult tradeoff between employment gains and the ongoing cost-of-living pressure on households.
content: Friday’s strong jobs report could soon feel like a double-edged sword for borrowers struggling to keep up with inflation and their bills.

zh.title: 美联储加息可能已经太晚了——这对这些借款人来说是坏消息
zh.summary: 周五好于预期的就业报告基本消除了美联储近期降息的可能性，让正在与持续通胀作斗争的借款人失望。强劲的劳动力市场在就业增长和家庭持续生活成本压力之间造成了困难的权衡。

title: As AI-related stocks dive, the market's winners have one thing in common
summary: Market analysis reveals that despite declining AI-related stocks, certain securities share common characteristics that have driven their outperformance. The Investing Club's afternoon Homestretch update identifies patterns in winning stocks as market conditions shift.
content: Every weekday, the Investing Club releases the Homestretch; an actionable afternoon update just in time for the last hour of trading.

zh.title: 随着AI相关股票下跌，市场赢家有一个共同之处
zh.summary: 市场分析显示，尽管AI相关股票下跌，但某些证券有共同的特征推动了它们的超额表现。投资俱乐部的下午Homestretch更新在市场条件变化时识别了获胜股票的模式。

title: AI may be killing some high-tech jobs, but it’s also creating others. See who’s winning and losing.
summary: While artificial intelligence has the potential to displace jobs in technology and other sectors, current evidence shows AI has not yet triggered widespread layoffs across industries. Researchers note that AI adoption continues to create new roles even as it transforms existing ones.
content: Artificial intelligence might terminate lots of jobs one day, especially in high tech, but there’s little evidence AI is already causing widespread layoffs.

zh.title: 人工智能可能正在杀死一些高科技工作，但它也在创造其他工作。看看谁在赢谁在输。
zh.summary: 虽然人工智能有可能在科技和其他部门取代工作，但目前的证据表明人工智能还没有在各行业引发大规模裁员。研究人员指出，人工智能的采用继续创造新角色，即使它正在转变现有的角色。

title: Trump wants Bill Pulte to fire big chunk of national intelligence office staff: WSJ
summary: President Trump has discussed with Bill Pulte, his acting national intelligence director, plans to significantly reduce staffing at the national intelligence office, drawing criticism from Congress. Pulte's appointment was already contentious, and the proposed cuts are likely to intensify the debate.
content: President Trump's comments are sure to roil members of Congress who criticized the appointment of Bill Pulte as acting national intelligence director.

zh.title: 特朗普想让比尔·普尔特解雇国家情报机构的大部分员工：华尔街日报
zh.summary: 特朗普与担任代理国家情报总监的比尔·普尔特讨论了大幅减少国家情报机构人员配置的计划，这引发了国会的批评。普尔特的任命本身就很有争议，提议的裁员可能会加剧辩论。

title: This credit-card pointsmaxxer booked a $16,000 first-class Emirates flight for $400 — and you can, too
summary: A credit card rewards specialist booked a $16,000 Emirates first-class flight for just $400 by strategically combining and redeeming airline miles and rewards points. The deal demonstrates that substantial savings remain available to savvy travelers who understand credit card optimization strategies.
content: It’s trickier to find good deals with airline miles, but it’s still possible to get “insane value.”

zh.title: 这位信用卡积分最大化达人以400美元预订了价值16000美元的阿联酋航空头等舱航班——你也可以做到
zh.summary: 一位信用卡奖励专家通过战略性地结合和兑换航空里程和奖励积分,以400美元预订了价值16000美元的阿联酋航空头等舱航班。该案例证明,那些了解信用卡优化策略的精明旅客仍有机会获得可观的节省。

title: Hot jobs report puts Fed cuts further out of reach as Chair Warsh faces policy tests
summary: May's robust jobs report has pushed interest rate cuts further into the future, eliminating any near-term relief for borrowers and complicating policy decisions for new Federal Reserve Chair Warsh. The strong employment data prioritizes inflation concerns over rate-cut expectations among Fed officials.
content: Another big jobs report in May has swept aside the possibility of interest rate cuts anytime soon.

zh.title: 强劲就业报告使美联储降息的希望更加遥远,主席沃什面临政策考验
zh.summary: 5月份强劲的就业报告将利率下调推向了更远的未来,消除了借款人的近期救济希望,并使新美联储主席沃什的政策决策复杂化。强劲的就业数据使美联储官员们更关注通胀问题,而不是降息预期。

title: Elon Musk needs the cultish support of everyday investors to pull off the massive SpaceX IPO
summary: Elon Musk is preparing SpaceX for an initial public offering expected to raise approximately $23 billion and is seeking significant participation from retail investors. Musk's success will depend on generating enthusiasm from individual investors willing to support the company's ambitious space exploration goals.
content: “They’re going to have to own it”: Elon Musk wants retail investors to buy some $23 billion of SpaceX shares next week.

zh.title: 埃隆·马斯克需要普通投资者的狂热支持,才能顺利进行规模巨大的SpaceX首次公开募股
zh.summary: 埃隆·马斯克正在为SpaceX的首次公开募股做准备,预计融资约230亿美元,并寻求散户投资者的重大参与。马斯克的成功将取决于他能否激发个人投资者的热情,使其愿意支持该公司雄心勃勃的太空探索目标。

title: Apple stock is coming hot into next week's WWDC. How the company can meet the moment
summary: Apple stock is entering its annual developer conference with investor focus squarely on the company's artificial intelligence strategy and capabilities. Apple Intelligence and its competitive positioning in the AI market will likely dominate discussion at WWDC 2026.
content: When it comes to Apple and what investors in the stock at these levels care about, it is all about Apple Intelligence

zh.title: 苹果股价进入WWDC前夕势头强劲。公司如何应对这一刻
zh.summary: 苹果股价进入其年度开发者大会时期，投资者关注焦点完全集中在该公司的人工智能战略和能力上。苹果智能及其在AI市场中的竞争地位可能将主导2026年WWDC的讨论。

title: Chip stock breakout vs the rest of tech showing signs of topping out, says Carter Worth
summary: The Philadelphia Stock Exchange Semiconductor Index has fully recovered its losses relative to the broader S&P 500 technology sector, but technical analysis suggests the chip stock rally may be approaching a peak. The strong comeback raises questions about whether gains can be sustained.
content: The Philadelphia Stock Exchange Semiconductor Index finally has recouped all its relative losses to the S&P 500 Information Technology Sector.

zh.title: 芯片股相对科技股的突破显示见顶迹象，卡特·沃思表示
zh.summary: 费城交易所半导体指数相对更广泛的标普500科技板块已完全收复失地，但技术分析表明芯片股涨势可能接近峰值。强劲的回升引发了收益是否能维持的疑问。

title: Prediction market firms face growing scrutiny as Congress weighs regulation
summary: Congress is considering legislation that would ban members and their staff from placing certain bets on prediction market platforms such as Kalshi and Polymarket. The proposed regulation aims to prevent lawmakers from profiting off their inside knowledge of legislative outcomes.
content: Rep. Bryan Steil, R-Wisc., is working on a bill to ban Congress members and their staff from certain bets on prediction markets such as Kalshi and Polymarket.

zh.title: 预测市场公司面临日益严格审查，国会权衡监管措施
zh.summary: 国会正在考虑立法禁止议员及其工作人员在Kalshi和Polymarket等预测市场平台上下注。拟议的监管措施旨在防止立法者利用其关于立法结果的内幕知识获利。

title: Apple's WWDC: Tim Cook's AI legacy at stake in his final developer conference as CEO
summary: Apple's upcoming Worldwide Developers Conference represents a critical moment for CEO Tim Cook's artificial intelligence strategy as he approaches retirement. The company faces pressure to demonstrate compelling AI capabilities for Siri and justify its current stock valuation to investors and developers.
content: Apple heads into WWDC with Tim Cook’s AI legacy, Siri’s future as an agentic platform, and the stock’s rich valuation all on the line.

zh.title: 苹果WWDC：蒂姆·库克人工智能遗产在其作为首席执行官的最后一次开发者大会上岌岌可危
zh.summary: 苹果公司即将召开的全球开发者大会代表了首席执行官蒂姆·库克人工智能战略的关键时刻，而他正在接近退休。该公司面临压力，需要展示Siri令人信服的人工智能功能，并向投资者和开发者证明其当前股票估值的合理性。

title: Final pieces fired at Denby as production ends
summary: Denby, the historic Derbyshire pottery manufacturer, is ending production after decades of operation. The company's closure marks the end of a significant British ceramics industry presence as the final pieces are completed.
content: "We are so hugely proud of everything this Derbyshire pottery has achieved," the company says.

zh.title: 丹比生产结束，最后陶瓷制品完成烧制
zh.summary: 历史悠久的德比郡陶瓷制造商丹比在运营数十年后停止生产。该公司的关闭标志着英国陶瓷工业重要参与者的终结，最后的陶瓷制品已完成。

title: Odds of a Fed hike this year jump on prediction markets
summary: Prediction market odds for a Federal Reserve interest rate hike this year have surged to 52% following a stronger-than-expected jobs report. The data suggests traders increasingly expect the Fed to raise rates despite previous inflation-cooling efforts.
content: Following an unexpectedly hot jobs report, prediction market traders see a 52% chance the Federal Reserve increases interest rates this year.

zh.title: 预测市场上美联储今年加息的赔率大幅跳升
zh.summary: 在一份强于预期的就业报告后，预测市场对美联储今年加息的赔率已飙升至52%。数据表明，尽管之前采取了降通胀措施，交易员越来越期望美联储提高利率。

title: The gold chart looks precarious. Here's how to profit
summary: Gold prices are at a technically vulnerable position according to technical analysis, presenting potential trading opportunities for investors. Options markets may be underpricing the actual risk, creating profit opportunities for traders willing to take positions based on this analysis.
content: Gold is at a technically precarious juncture, and the good news for you is that options market may be mispricing the risk.

zh.title: 黄金图表岌岌可危。以下是如何盈利的方法
zh.summary: 根据技术分析，黄金价格处于技术上脆弱的位置，为投资者提供潜在的交易机会。期权市场可能低估了实际风险，为愿意根据此分析采取头寸的交易员创造了盈利机会。

title: AI is designing OpenAI's next model in a sign of 'superintelligence': SoftBank's Masayoshi Son to CNBC
summary: SoftBank CEO Masayoshi Son told CNBC that artificial intelligence is now assisting in the design of OpenAI's next model, which he views as evidence of advancing superintelligence. Son believes his previous estimate of 10 years for superintelligence arrival was overly conservative, suggesting it could occur much sooner.
content: SoftBank CEO Masayoshi Son said his forecast of artificial superintelligence arriving in 10 years was "conservative" and thinks it will be here sooner.

zh.title: 人工智能正在设计OpenAI的下一个模型，作为"超级智能"的迹象：软银首席执行官孙正义对CNBC表示
zh.summary: 软银首席执行官孙正义告诉CNBC，人工智能目前正在协助设计OpenAI的下一个模型，他认为这是超级智能进步的证据。孙正义认为他之前对超级智能到来的10年估计过于保守，表明可能很快就会发生。

title: U.S. Senate passes $70 billion ICE funding, fails to ban Trump's 'anti-weaponization' fund
summary: The U.S. Senate approved $70 billion in funding for Immigration and Customs Enforcement and Border Patrol agencies implementing the Trump administration's deportation operations. The Senate failed to pass restrictions on a controversial 'anti-weaponization' fund, allowing the funding to proceed without that limitation.
content: Nearly all of the funding would go to DHS's ICE and Border Patrol agencies that are carrying out the Trump admin's vigorous deportations throughout the U.S.

zh.title: 美国参议院批准70亿美元移民执法局资金，未能禁止特朗普的"反武器化"基金
zh.summary: 美国参议院批准了70亿美元的资金用于实施特朗普政府驱逐出境行动的移民和海关执法机构和边境巡逻队。参议院未能通过对有争议的"反武器化"基金的限制，允许该资金在没有该限制的情况下继续进行。

title: U.S. payrolls rose by 172,000 in May, much more than expected; unemployment at 4.3%
summary: U.S. nonfarm payrolls grew 172,000 in May, far exceeding expectations of 80,000, while unemployment remained at 4.3%. The unexpectedly strong job growth suggests resilience in the labor market amid broader economic uncertainties.
content: Nonfarm payrolls were expected to increase by 80,000 in May while the unemployment rate held at 4.3%.

zh.title: 美国5月新增就业17.2万人，远超预期；失业率维持在4.3%
zh.summary: 美国5月非农就业人数增长17.2万人，远超预期的8万人，失业率保持在4.3%。这种出人意料的强劲就业增长表明劳动力市场在更广泛的经济不确定性中保持韧性。

title: ‘This would be a one-time event’: How can I take extra money from my 401(k) without triggering higher Medicare premiums?
summary: Strategic 401(k) withdrawals can help retirees minimize Medicare premium increases, which are income-based. Planning is crucial for those making substantial withdrawals for major expenses or planned spending.
content: “I generally withdraw money from my traditional 401(k) for projects, larger expenses and sometimes just to stay ahead on upcoming bills.”

zh.title: "这将是一次性事件"：我如何从401(k)账户提取额外资金而不触发更高的医疗保险费？
zh.summary: 策略性401(k)提款可以帮助退休人员最小化医疗保险保费上升，这些保费是基于收入的。对于进行大额提款用于重大开支或计划支出的人来说，规划至关重要。

title: Hospitality jobs boom as US prepares for World Cup
summary: Job creation accelerated in leisure and hospitality sectors as the U.S. prepares for the World Cup. The Bureau of Labor Statistics confirmed the employment gains in the typically seasonal industries.
content: The Bureau of Labor Statistics says new jobs were created in the leisure and hospitality sectors.

zh.title: 美国为世界杯做准备，酒店和旅游业就业激增
zh.summary: 随着美国为世界杯做准备，休闲和酒店业部门的就业创造加速。劳工统计局确认了这些通常是季节性产业的就业增长。

title: Bitcoin caps a dismal week as price wallows 50% below its all-time high
summary: Bitcoin continues to languish, trading about 50% below its all-time high with limited signs of recovery. Investors await either a sustained rebound or the traditional dip-buying support that has historically stabilized the cryptocurrency.
content: A rebound in the digital currency, or characteristic dip-buying by investors, is yet to take place.

zh.title: 比特币经历惨淡一周，价格下跌至历史高点的50%以下
zh.summary: 比特币继续低迷，交易价格约为历史高点的50%以下，复苏迹象有限。投资者期待要么出现持续反弹，要么出现历史上曾稳定加密货币的传统低吸支撑。

title: Is there an AI stock market bubble, and is it ready to burst?
summary: U.S. stock markets hit record highs despite concerns about inflation, geopolitical tensions, and rising debt, with gains largely driven by AI enthusiasm. The rally has sparked debate over whether valuations reflect underlying fundamentals.
content: Despite the Iran war, inflation and debt fears, US markets keep hitting record highs, fueled largely by AI. BBC's Samira Hussain looks into whether that bubble will burst.

zh.title: 存在人工智能股市泡沫吗？它准备好破裂了吗？
zh.summary: 尽管存在通胀、地缘政治紧张局势和债务上升的担忧，美国股市创历史新高，涨幅主要由人工智能热情推动。这场反弹引发了关于估值是否反映基本面的争议。

title: Bulls declare victory in AI debate, but two classic signs of a market top are looming
summary: While AI optimists declare market victory, classic technical warning signs suggest a potential market top is approaching. Strategists point to the 'capex recycling' trend as a key concern for equity valuations.
content: The trend of ‘capex recycling’ is considered a problem by a TS Lombard analyst

zh.title: 看多者宣布在人工智能辩论中获胜，但两个经典市场顶部信号即将出现
zh.summary: 虽然人工智能乐观主义者宣称市场胜利，但经典的技术警告信号表明潜在的市场顶部即将到来。策略师指出"资本支出回收"趋势是对股权估值的关键担忧。

title: Where investors may find the next 'big wave' for AI trade
summary: Investment analysts are identifying emerging opportunities in the AI sector as traders seek the next major rally catalyst. The focus is shifting toward which segments of the AI market may drive the next phase of gains.
content: Tim Urbanowicz, chief investment strategist at Innovator from Goldman Sachs Asset Management, tackles the AI boom.

zh.title: 投资者可能在哪里找到人工智能交易的下一个"大波澜"
zh.summary: 投资分析师正在识别人工智能领域的新兴机会，因为交易员寻求下一个主要反弹催化剂。关注点正在转向人工智能市场的哪些部分可能推动下一阶段的增长。

title: Here are Friday's biggest analyst calls: Nvidia, Apple, Tesla, Chipotle, Disney, Robinhood, Coinbase & more
summary: Wall Street analysts issued significant calls Friday on megacap stocks including Nvidia, Apple, Tesla, Chipotle, Disney, Robinhood, and Coinbase. These recommendations typically influence institutional trading decisions across markets.
content: Here are Friday's biggest calls on Wall Street.

zh.title: 以下是周五最大的分析师评级：英伟达、苹果、特斯拉、Chipotle、迪士尼、罗宾汉、Coinbase等
zh.summary: 华尔街分析师周五对包括英伟达、苹果、特斯拉、Chipotle、迪士尼、罗宾汉和Coinbase等超大型股票发布了重要评级。这些建议通常会影响机构投资者的交易决策。

title: Alphabet is seeking fresh capital as stock's 4-week losing streak tests investor appetite
summary: Alphabet announced it will double capital spending to $190 billion in 2026 and is seeking fresh investor capital to fund expansion. The announcement comes as the stock faces a four-week losing streak, testing investor appetite for growth spending.
content: Alphabet expects capex to reach up to $190 billion this year, double last year's spending, and the company is turning to investors to help fund its expansion.

zh.title: Alphabet股票四周跌势考验投资者胃口，寻求新资本
zh.summary: Alphabet宣布将在2026年将资本支出增加一倍至1900亿美元，并寻求新的投资者资本来资助扩张。该公告发布之际，该股票面临四周的下跌，考验投资者对增长支出的胃口。

title: Broadway's $1.9 billion season is the latest sign of consumers splurging on experiences
summary: Broadway recorded a record $1.9 billion season as consumers continue to prioritize spending on live experiences over goods. The strong performance suggests sustained consumer demand for entertainment and cultural events.
content: Sunday's Tony Awards follow a record-breaking season on Broadway. The awards often lead to further ticket sales for winning shows.

zh.title: 百老汇的19亿美元赛季是消费者热衷体验消费的最新迹象
zh.summary: 百老汇创造了创纪录的19亿美元赛季,因为消费者继续优先选择花钱观看现场表演而非购买商品。强劲的表现表明消费者对娱乐和文化活动的需求持续旺盛。

title: Family offices bet on sports, from pickleball leagues to smart soccer balls
summary: Family offices representing the ultra-wealthy are increasing investments in sports-related opportunities, from pickleball leagues to smart sports technology. The shift reflects diversification away from technology startup concentration among elite investors.
content: While AI startups dominate deal-making news, investment firms of the ultra-rich are still keen on sports.

zh.title: 家族办公室押注体育产业,从匹克球联赛到智能足球
zh.summary: 代表超级富豪的家族办公室正在增加对体育相关机会的投资,从匹克球联赛到智能体育技术。这一转变反映了精英投资者在减少对科技初创公司的集中投资。

title: A new blood test can help detect colon cancer, but it’s not as good as the test you hate to take
summary: A new blood test offers a non-invasive alternative for detecting colon cancer but is less effective than traditional colonoscopy. The development is significant as roughly 50 million Americans lack colorectal cancer screening despite rising incidence rates.
content: About 50 million Americans aren’t getting screened for colon cancer at a time when colon-cancer rates are rising.

zh.title: 新血液检测可以帮助检测结肠癌,但不如你讨厌的检测方法有效
zh.summary: 新血液检测为检测结肠癌提供了非侵入性替代方案,但不如传统结肠镜检查有效。这一进展意义重大,因为尽管结肠癌发病率上升,但仍有大约5000万美国人缺乏结肠癌筛查。

title: Here’s the downside to record-setting stock markets across the globe that are generating a wealth boom
summary: Record stock market performance globally has benefited existing investors while leaving lower-income consumers behind, widening wealth inequality. Rising stock valuations are also contributing to persistent inflationary pressures, according to Bank of America analysis.
content: While some Americans are enjoying the fruits of the stock market bonanza, their consumption is stirring inflation and lower-income consumers are missing out altogether, says Bank of America.

zh.title: 创纪录的全球股市带来财富繁荣的负面影响
zh.summary: 全球股市创纪录表现使现有投资者受益，但低收入消费者被甩在身后，加剧了财富不平等。美银分析指出，股票估值上升也在加剧持续的通胀压力。

title: No tech, no problem. Dow makes record and traders think these stocks can lead now
summary: The Dow reached record levels while traders show renewed interest in healthcare stocks over technology holdings. Options trading and market activity suggest a potential sector rotation as investors reassess valuations.
content: Traders bought about 5,300 calls in the State Street Health Care Select Sector SPDR ETF (XLV) on Thursday, compared to just over 1,000 puts, according to data from ThinkOrSwim.

zh.title: 没有科技也没问题。道指创纪录高位，交易员认为这些股票现在可以领跑
zh.summary: 道指达到创纪录水平，交易员对医疗保健股票重燃兴趣，超过科技类股。期权交易和市场活动表明投资者在重新评估估值之际，可能出现行业轮动。

title: Stocks making the biggest moves premarket: Lululemon, Micron, ServiceTitan, Strategy & more
summary: Multiple stocks posted significant premarket moves Friday, including Lululemon, Micron, ServiceTitan, and others across consumer, semiconductor, and enterprise software sectors. Premarket activity often signals themes for broader market trading later in the session.
content: These are the stocks posting the largest moves premarket.

zh.title: 盘前波动最大的股票：Lululemon、美光、ServiceTitan、Strategy等
zh.summary: 周五多只股票出现显著盘前波动，包括Lululemon、美光、ServiceTitan和其他消费品、半导体和企业软件领域的股票。盘前活动通常预示了稍后整个市场交易的主题。

title: One quadrillion is the number used to describe the wealth effect of South Korea’s stock-market miracle
summary: South Korea's stock market has more than doubled this year, creating significant wealth effects across the population. The optimistic scenario estimates a wealth effect of KRW 43 trillion ($28 billion), demonstrating the economic impact of the market surge.
content: Having more than doubled already this year, Korea’s stock market returns have driven a wealth effect that under an optimistic scenario could generate a wealth effect among the populace of KRW 43 trillion ($28 billion)

zh.title: 四万亿韩元：韩国股市奇迹产生的财富效应
zh.summary: 韩国股市今年增长超过一倍，在全社会产生了显著的财富效应。乐观情景估计财富效应达43万亿韩元（280亿美元），展现了股市增长的经济影响。

title: We need to have ability to slow AI down, says Anthropic co-founder
summary: Anthropic co-founder Jack Clark warns that AI could eventually develop autonomously without human input, emphasizing the need for mechanisms to control AI development pace. The statement highlights growing concerns about maintaining human oversight as AI systems become more powerful.
content: Jack Clark tells BBC's Newsnight AI could get to the point where it develops without human input.

zh.title: Anthropic联合创始人称需要有能力放缓人工智能发展
zh.summary: Anthropic联合创始人杰克·克拉克警告称，人工智能最终可能在无需人类输入的情况下自主发展，强调了控制人工智能发展步伐的必要性。该声明凸显了随着人工智能系统日益强大，维持人类监督的日益增长的重要性。

title: China poaches more AI talent from the U.S. as it eyes the next 'super-app'
summary: China is increasingly recruiting AI talent from the United States, with Tencent's Chief AI Scientist Yao Shunyu—formerly of OpenAI—now pursuing artificial general intelligence development. This trend reflects China's strategic push to build competitive AI capabilities domestically.
content: Tencent Chief AI Scientist Yao Shunyu, who joined the company from OpenAI, said Friday he aims to pursue artificial general intelligence.

zh.title: 中国在争夺"超级应用"之际从美国挖角更多AI人才
zh.summary: 中国正在大量从美国招募人工智能人才，腾讯首席人工智能科学家、前OpenAI科学家姚舜宇正在参与人工通用智能开发。这一趋势反映了中国建立国内竞争力人工智能能力的战略举措。

title: India's cenbank cuts growth outlook, raises inflation forecast as it keeps rates steady at 5.25%
summary: India's Reserve Bank cut its growth forecast to 6.6% while raising its inflation projection to 5.1%, maintaining interest rates at 5.25%. The adjustments reflect economic headwinds as the RBI balances inflation concerns with growth targets.
content: RBI raised its inflation projection for the year ending March 2027 by 50 basis points to 5.1%, while cutting growth forecast to 6.6% for the year, from 6.9%.

zh.title: 印度央行下调增长前景，上调通胀预期，维持利率在5.25%
zh.summary: 印度央行将增长预期下调至6.6%，同时将通胀预期上调至5.1%，维持利率在5.25%不变。这些调整反映了经济逆风，印度央行在平衡通胀担忧与增长目标之间取得平衡。

title: Grant puts gloss on paint recycling enterprise
summary: A Cambridgeshire-based paint recycling social enterprise has received a £400,000 grant from the National Lottery to support its expansion. The funding enables the business to scale its sustainable recycling operations.
content: A Cambridgeshire social enterprise is awarded £400,000 by the National Lottery to help it expand.

zh.title: 补助金为油漆回收企业增添光彩
zh.summary: 一家位于剑桥郡的油漆回收社会企业获得了国家彩票基金会40万英镑的补助，以支持其扩展。该资金使该企业能够扩大其可持续回收业务。

title: China cracks down on soft porn, violence and materialism in viral micro dramas
summary: China is cracking down on micro dramas that contain adult content, violence, and materialistic themes as the format surges in popularity. The regulatory action aims to address concerns about increasingly sensationalist content in the viral short-form video space.
content: Micro dramas have surged in popularity, but drawn criticism for often sensationalist content.

zh.title: 中国严厉打击病毒式微剧中的软色情、暴力和物质主义内容
zh.summary: 随着微剧格式的流行程度激增，中国正在严厉打击包含成人内容、暴力和物质主义主题的微剧。这一监管行动旨在解决病毒式短视频领域中越来越多耸人听闻内容的问题。

title: Chippies turn to new species amid 'massive' cod price rise
summary: UK fish and chip shops are switching to alternative fish species as cod prices surge dramatically, with experts describing the fish as "white gold" due to scarcity. The price increases are forcing businesses to adapt their traditional menus.
content: Experts say cod has turned into "white gold" as the prices keeps going up.

zh.title: 英国炸鱼薯条店应对鳕鱼价格飙升转向新鱼种
zh.summary: 随着鳕鱼价格大幅上涨，英国炸鱼薯条店正在转向替代鱼种。专家们因鳕鱼稀缺而将其称为"白色黄金"。价格上升迫使这些企业调整传统菜单。

title: Tracking website, food watch: South Korea is obsessing over Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang's visit
summary: South Korean investors are closely monitoring Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang's activities during his visit, anticipating major announcements about the AI company's future plans. The heightened attention reflects South Korea's strategic interest in Nvidia's next moves in the AI market.
content: South Korean investors are eagerly tracking Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang's every move as they wait to see what the AI megacap company will do next.

zh.title: 追踪网站、美食监测热潮：韩国沉迷于英伟达CEO黄仁勋的访问
zh.summary: 韩国投资者正在密切监控英伟达CEO黄仁勋访问期间的活动，期待该AI公司发布关于未来计划的重大公告。这种高度关注反映了韩国对英伟达在AI市场中下一步举措的战略兴趣。

title: British Heart Foundation plans to close 150 charity shops
summary: The British Heart Foundation announced plans to close 150 charity shops due to an exceptionally challenging retail environment. The closures reflect broader pressures facing UK charities navigating difficult economic conditions.
content: The charity says it is facing "an exceptionally challenging trading environment".

zh.title: 英国心脏基金会计划关闭150家慈善商店
zh.summary: 由于零售环境异常严峻，英国心脏基金会宣布计划关闭150家慈善商店。这些关闭反映了英国慈善机构在应对困难经济条件中面临的更广泛压力。

title: In ‘wild’ twist, SpaceX won’t be allowed early entry to the S&P 500 after all
summary: Despite consideration of policy changes, S&P Dow Jones Indices decided to maintain unchanged requirements, preventing SpaceX from obtaining early entry into the S&P 500 index. The decision preserves current index inclusion standards despite anticipated pressure.
content: S&P Dow Jones Indices considered whether to loosen index requirements but opted to keep its policies unchanged.

zh.title: 在"意外转折"中，SpaceX最终不被允许提前进入标普500指数
zh.summary: 尽管考虑了政策变更，标普道琼斯指数公司决定维持不变的要求，防止SpaceX获得提前进入标普500指数的资格。该决定在预期压力下保持了当前的指数纳入标准。

title: Warren invites Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang to Senate hearing on China AI chip sales
summary: Senator Elizabeth Warren is calling for a Senate hearing with Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang to address concerns about export controls, China sales, and AI chip policy as Congress scrutinizes the sector.
content: Sen. Elizabeth Warren is pressing Jensen Huang's Nvidia over export controls, China sales, Trump and data-center policy as Congress scrutinizes the AI chip boom.

zh.title: 沃伦邀请英伟达首席执行官黄仁勋出席关于中国AI芯片销售的参议院听证会
zh.summary: 参议员伊丽莎白·沃伦呼吁召开参议院听证会，邀请英伟达首席执行官黄仁勋讨论出口管制、中国销售和AI芯片政策问题，因为国会正在对该行业进行审查。

title: SpaceX blocked from early U.S. benchmark index entry as S&P reaffirms existing rules
summary: S&P Global declined to change its index entry requirements, preventing SpaceX from early inclusion in major indices ahead of Elon Musk's planned IPO.
content: S&P Global said Thursday it was not changing the requirements for entry into its major indices, dealing a setback to the IPO plans of Elon Musk's SpaceX.

zh.title: 标普重申现有规则，SpaceX被阻止提前进入美国基准指数
zh.summary: 标普全球拒绝改变其指数纳入要求，导致SpaceX在埃隆·马斯克计划的首次公开募股前无法提前纳入主要指数。

title: South Korea stocks fall 4% as tech heavyweights follow plunge in Wall Street's AI-linked names
summary: South Korean markets declined 4% as major tech stocks fell in line with a Wall Street rotation away from AI-related chip investments.
content: Asia-Pacific markets fell on Friday as investors assessed a rotation out of chip stocks on Wall Street that lifted the Dow Jones Industrial Average to a record close.

zh.title: 韩国股市跌4%，科技巨头跟随华尔街AI相关股票暴跌
zh.summary: 韩国市场下跌4%，主要科技股票跟随华尔街从AI相关芯片投资的轮换而下跌。

title: Trump announces $700m coal investment using wartime powers
summary: President Trump is directing $700 million toward coal investment using emergency wartime powers as the Iran conflict drives up energy costs.
content: The president is directing money into coal as the Iran war drives up energy costs for Americans.

zh.title: 特朗普利用战时权力宣布投资7亿美元煤炭
zh.summary: 特朗普总统正在利用紧急战时权力向煤炭投资拨款7亿美元，因为伊朗冲突导致能源成本上升。
